remember: Students will be able to identify and recall the key events and figures related to the framing of the Indian Constitution.
Students will be able to list and describe the main provisions of the Constitution.
understand: Students will be able to explain the significance of the Constituent Assembly in framing the Constitution.
Students will be able to describe the role of key leaders and their contributions to the Constitution-making process.
apply: Students will be able to analyze the impact of the Constituent Assembly's decisions on the Indian Constitution and its provisions.
Students will be able to evaluate the importance of the Constitution in shaping India's political and social landscape.
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast the different drafts of the Constitution and their implications.
Students will be able to assess the role of key social and political groups in influencing the Constitution-making process.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the significance of the Constituent Assembly in framing the Constitution.
As per NCERT objective 2: To describe the role of key leaders and their contributions to the Constitution-making process.
As per NCERT objective 3: To analyze the impact of the Constituent Assembly's decisions on the Indian Constitution and its provisions.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the key events and figures related to the framing of the Indian Constitution.
To describe the main provisions of the Constitution and their significance.
To evaluate the importance of the Constitution in shaping India's political and social landscape.
